title: Count Triplets That Can Form Two Arrays of Equal XOR
hints: Notice that a == b implies a ^ b == 0. What does the XOR sum of the entire subarray from i to k equal?
If the XOR sum of arr[i...k] is 0, how many valid split points j exist within that range?
Iterate over all pairs (i, k). If their prefix XORs match, add the number of valid j values to the answer.
